# Neuratio

> AI-powered ticketing platform for machinery manufacturers' customer service

Neuratio is a B2B SaaS platform that automates after-sales support for industrial machinery companies using artificial intelligence. It analyzes technical requests, suggests intelligent responses, automatically escalates complex issues, and maintains a centralized knowledge base — enabling 24/7 multilingual support while reducing operational costs.

## Company

- **Legal name**: Neuratio S.r.l.
- **VAT**: IT 04170290045
- **Location**: Fossano (CN), Italy
- **Founded**: June 10, 2025
- **Incubated at**: I3P — Incubatore del Politecnico di Torino
- **Member of**: Polo Innovazione ICT (Piedmont digital innovation cluster)
- **Contact**: privacy@neuratio.ai

## Pages

- [Home](https://neuratio.ai/): Main landing page — value proposition, features, clients, founders
- [Problems & Solutions](https://neuratio.ai/problemi-soluzioni): Pain points and AI-powered solutions
- [Book a Demo](https://neuratio.ai/#contact): 30-minute personalized demo via HubSpot calendar
- [Privacy Policy](https://neuratio.ai/privacy-policy): GDPR compliance
- [Cookie Policy](https://neuratio.ai/cookie-policy): Cookie disclosure
